error_signature: no data is being written to the target Google Sheet
title: Data not appearing in Google Sheet after API call
symptom: The API call in the n8n workflow executes successfully, but no data is written to the specified Google Sheet.
not_this_if: Data is written to the sheet but in an unexpected location
root_cause: The Google Sheets node may not be configured with the correct table range, causing data to be written outside the visible area of the sheet, such as in a row that is not displayed or is beyond the expected range.
fix_steps: Open the Google Sheets node settings
Define the correct table range for the data
Re-run the workflow to check if data appears
agent_instruction: Define the table range in the Google Sheets node settings and save the workflow.
